Create a new GiottoDB object

Source: R/GiottoDB-class.R
GiottoDB.Rd

Create a new GiottoDB object, which is a database-backed implementation of the Giotto object.

Usage

GiottoDB(con, ...)

Arguments

con

A DBIConnection object to a duckdb::duckdb database

...

Additional arguments passed to the giotto constructor

Value

A GiottoDB object

Examples

if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{
# Create a new GiottoDB object with a new database connection
library(GiottoDB)
library(duckdb)
library(DBI)

# Create a connection to a DuckDB database
con <- dbConnect(duckdb(), dbdir = ":memory:")
dbSpatial::loadSpatial(con) # Load spatial extension

# Create a new GiottoDB object
gobj_db <- GiottoDB(con = con)

# Don't forget to close the connection when done
dbDisconnect(con, shutdown = TRUE)
} # }
